evidence_quotes.quote: video games, being shut down by their developers and being unable to be used again.
We simply wish for the ability for the video games after the developers don't want to continue supporting them, to have them given to us to keep them up in some form or another.

paragraphs.text: This has been a recent happening of video games, being shut down by their developers and being unable to be used again. After buying them usually for the range of 30-70 euros, this is a big investment of money and time that by shutting then down is simply too cruel to face on the regular. We simply wish for the ability for the video games after the developers don't want to continue supporting them, to have them given to us to keep them up in some form or another.
